text: landlord কে 10000 টাকা পাঠালাম TakaPay দিয়ে, সাথে সাথে চলে গেল।
english_translation: I sent 10000 taka to my landlord via TakaPay, and it was done instantly.

author: Fahim37
text: Why is TakaPay charging 15 taka to cash out 300? This is robbery.
english_translation: Why is TakaPay charging 15 taka to cash out 300? This is robbery.

author: Nabil12
text: TakaPay e WASA bill dilam ar 5000 taka cashback pelam, darun offer!
english_translation: I paid my WASA bill on TakaPay and got 5000 taka cashback, great offer!

author: Lamia5
text: baba কে টাকা পাঠিয়েছি 2 ghonta আগে, এখনো পৌঁছায়নি। TakaPay কী করছে?
english_translation: I sent money to my father via TakaPay 2 hours ago, but it has not arrived yet. What is TakaPay doing?

author: Jony64
text: TakaPay diye ma ke 2000 taka pathalam, 2 ghonta hoye gelo ekhono pending!
english_translation: I sent 2000 taka to my mother via TakaPay, but it has been pending for 2 hours.

author: Sadia24
text: NgoodPay er bill pay UI ta TakaPay theke clean, WASA bill dite easy laglo.
english_translation: NgoodPay's bill pay UI is cleaner than TakaPay, it was easy to pay my WASA bill.
